title: Smile Transformations
subtitle: Real patients, real results. See the difference Luxe Dental makes.

beforeAfter.title: Brilliant Results
beforeAfter.goalDesc: Eliminate deep stains and achieve a naturally bright, radiant smile.
beforeAfter.treatmentDesc: In-office laser whitening combined with a custom take-home protocol for lasting results.
beforeAfter.outcomeDesc: A stunning, luminous smile that enhances overall facial aesthetics without sensitivity.

process.title: Bespoke Design Process
process.desc: Every transformation begins with our comprehensive Digital Smile Design consultation. We utilize advanced 3D imaging and facial analysis to architect a smile that harmonizes perfectly with your unique features, ensuring predictable, breathtaking results before treatment even begins.
